scripts.validate:contract: uv run --script ../../.agents/skills/source-to-video-director/scripts/validate_video_contract.py --source-package source-package.json --storyboard storyboard.md --shot-contract shot-contract.json --forbid gsap --require-anchor seed --require-anchor water --require-anchor oxygen --require-anchor warmth --require-anchor roots --require-anchor minerals --require-anchor leaves --require-anchor light --require-anchor CO2 --require-anchor sugars --require-anchor O2 --require-anchor xylem --require-anchor phloem --require-anchor "new cells" --require-anchor seeds --expect-shots 6
scripts.validate:composition: uv run --script ../../.agents/skills/scene-composition-director/scripts/validate_scene_composition_plan.py --plan composition-plan.json --expect-scenes 6 --require-anchor seed --require-anchor water --require-anchor roots --require-anchor light --require-anchor sugars --require-anchor "new cells" --forbid gsap
scripts.validate:transitions: uv run --script ../../.agents/skills/scene-transition-director/scripts/validate_transition_plan.py --plan transition-plan.json --expect-transitions 5 --expect-persistent-name "growth pulse" --expect-chain s01-seed-awakens,s02-roots-feed,s03-shoot-finds-light,s04-leaf-makes-sugar,s05-growth-zones,s06-cycle-continues --require-anchor seed --require-anchor roots --require-anchor leaf --require-anchor sugars --forbid gsap
